title: Section 1
content: (1) This Act may be called the Naga Hills-Tuensang Area Act, 1957. (2) It shall come into force on such date1 as the Central Government may, by notification in the Official Gazette, appoint.
footnote: 1. 1st December, 1957, vide notification No. S.R.O. 3843, dated 30th November, 1957, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3.
